title: Scott Mills Loses His Radio Job
summary: Scott Mills is a radio host who worked for the BBC. He was recently fired from his job on BBC Radio 2. The BBC said he is no longer working for them, but they did not say exactly why. Mills had been hosting the breakfast show on Radio 2 since January 2025. He finished his show one day and said he would be back, but the next morning, another host, Gary Davies, took over. The news was first reported by a newspaper called The Mirror. Lorna Clarke, a boss at the BBC, sent an email to staff saying this news might be surprising and shocking to everyone. Jeremy Vine, another radio host, said he was also surprised and had no more information. Mills has worked for the BBC for many years on different radio and TV shows.

background_read: The BBC is a public broadcaster in the UK that runs many radio and TV stations. Radio 2 is one of its popular stations with shows for adults. Hosts like Scott Mills present programs and talk to listeners. Sometimes, people can lose their jobs if there are problems, but the details are often kept private. This story is about a sudden change at Radio 2 that surprised many people.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scott Mills, a radio host for the BBC
WHAT: He was fired from his job on Radio 2
WHERE: At BBC Radio 2 in the UK
WHY: The BBC did not say why, but it might be due to personal conduct issues

perspectives.description: Many people, including staff and listeners, were surprised by the sudden news of Scott Mills being fired.
